body.title: Execute reorg per § 4 unclear cases (per-bucket Akien decisions 2026-05-01)
body.text:
# D-reorg-execute-2026-05-01
**title:** Execute reorg per § 4 unclear cases (per-bucket Akien decisions 2026-05-01)
**date:** 2026-05-01
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-sqlite-out-wild-0001-db, T-sqlite-out-word-graph-db, T-sqlite-out-claude-budget-db, T-reorg-bucket-archive-moves, T-closed-tickets-path-normalize

## Decision narrative
Akien reviewed the 12 unclear cases in lab/design_docs/reorg-plan-2026-05-01-opus-pass.md § 4 and ratified per-bucket decisions:

- **#1 (live .db files)** — REMOVE (CLAUDE.md "always protect" pre-dates Postgres migration). Migrate-first, debug-ready. Three sqlite-out tickets filed.
- **#2 seed_*.py** — MOVE → TheIgorsProject/seed_archive/ (palace migration absorbed)
- **#5 migrate_*.py** — MOVE → TheIgorsProject/migrations_archive/ (one-shot scripts)
- **#6 cc_memory_seed/** — MOVE → TheIgorsProject/20260427.Cleanup/auto_memory_archive/ (predecessor of live auto-memory)
- **#7 papers/history/_archive/** — MOVE → TheIgorsProject (loose .csb.txt files stay)
- **#11 closed_tickets.txt** — NORMALIZE path (~/.TheIgors/lab/claudecode/ → ~/.TheIgors/claudecode/)
- **#3 cc_skills/** — folds into D-claudeandakien-folded-2026-05-01 (workshop dead → datacenter)
- **#4 TheIgorsProject/skills/** — DELETE (executed inline; predecessors, git preserves)
- **#8 utility_closet/** — coordinated under T-capability-extraction-from-igor (already filed)
- **#9 TheIgorsProject root** — STAY (dump bucket pattern intentional)
- **#10 imap_stub_spike.py** — MOVE → UnseenUniversity/lab/spikes/ (executed inline)
- **#12 hosted_igor.txt** — MOVE → TheIgorsProject (executed inline)

#4, #10, #12 executed inline (3 simple moves, no cross-tree code deps); the bucket archive moves and .db migrations are tracked through the spawned tickets.

## Rollup

**Closed at:** 2026-05-02T23:09:17.941402+00:00
**Ticket count:** 5 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-closed-tickets-path-normalize (S) — Normalize closed_tickets.txt path (~/.TheIgors/lab/claudecode/ → ~/.TheIgors/claudecode/)  `done` — Normalized: cc_queue.py + github_sync.py both use ~/.TheIgors/claudecode/closed_tickets.txt. Merged 506+165→660 deduped lines (sort-desc, newest first). ~/.TheIgors/lab/{claudecode,} dirs removed. Com
- T-sqlite-out-claude-budget-db (M) — Migrate claude_budget.db SQLite → Postgres + delete file  `done` — Budget tracking migrated SQLite → Postgres (commit c246bdfa). Migration m053 creates infra.spend / infra.budget_config / infra.balance_history (BIGSERIAL ids, TIMESTAMPTZ, indexed). budget.py uses mak
- T-sqlite-out-word-graph-db (M) — Finish SQLite removal — purge word_graph.db construction + delete file  `done` — Word graph SQLite purged (commit 9c136308). Postgres clan.wg_* was authoritative since D126; 4.6GB SQLite file trashed (recoverable). Vestigial APIs removed: WordGraph(db_path=), default_cache_path(),
- T-sqlite-out-wild-0001-db (L) — Finish SQLite removal — purge wild-0001.db construction + delete file  `done` — wild-0001.db purged (commit 9bfc31ae). Cortex(db_path=Path) → Cortex(instance_id=str|None). self.db_path → self._cache_key_id. 80+ files updated (production tools + lab seeds + conftest + tests). 4 SQ
- T-reorg-bucket-archive-moves (M) — Reorg execute — bucket archive moves (seed/migrate/cc_memory_seed/papers-history-archive)  `done` — Partial ship (commit c3d3a039): 33 of 99 files moved. migrate_*.py (13) → TheIgorsProject/migrations_archive/. papers/history/_archive/ (20) → TheIgorsProject/papers_history_archive/. Suite 4186/0/32s

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
